nodes.label: oe-banner.svg
nodes.summary: SVG banner for the Open Energy platform titled 'Consolidated Energy Cockpit'. Contains a stylised three-interlocking-arcs mark (blue, teal, navy) with a central dot, and a bold geometric wordmark reading 'ENERGY COCKPIT' in two lines.

nodes.label: Three-Arc Brand Mark
nodes.summary: Geometric mark composed of three overlapping partial circles (arcs) in blue (#3b82c4), teal (#1f9b95), and navy (#1a3a5c), with a two-tone central dot. Positioned at left of banner.

nodes.label: ENERGY (wordmark line 1)
nodes.summary: Bold geometric sans-serif text 'ENERGY' in navy (#1a3a5c), font-size 72, using Metropolis / IBM Plex Sans / Inter typeface stack.

nodes.label: COCKPIT (wordmark line 2)
nodes.summary: Bold geometric sans-serif text 'COCKPIT' in blue (#3b82c4), font-size 72, using Metropolis / IBM Plex Sans / Inter typeface stack.

nodes.label: Navy #1a3a5c
nodes.summary: Primary navy brand colour used for the third arc, the central dot, and the 'ENERGY' wordmark text.

nodes.label: Blue #3b82c4
nodes.summary: Brand blue used for the first arc and the 'COCKPIT' wordmark text.

nodes.label: Teal #1f9b95
nodes.summary: Brand teal used for the second arc in the mark.

nodes.label: Consolidated Energy Cockpit
nodes.summary: Full product name declared in the SVG <title> and aria-label: 'Consolidated Energy Cockpit'. This is the accessible label for the banner.
